Class GenericProvider.Builder

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic.GenericProvider.Builder
Enclosing class:
GenericProvider
public static class GenericProvider.Builder extends Object
Builder used to construct GenericProvider instances.

The builder allows configuration of required repository metadata, API endpoints, and optional customisation hooks for parsing labels and constructing issue payloads.

If no custom parser or payload builder is supplied, default implementations are used.

Since:
0.2.0

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder()
      Creates a new GenericProvider.Builder instance for constructing a GenericProvider.

      Use the builder methods to configure repository information, endpoints, and optional custom parsers or payload builders before calling build().

  • Method Details

    • owner

      public GenericProvider.Builder owner(String owner)
      Sets the repository owner, organisation or namespace
      Parameters:
      owner - repository owner
      Returns:
      this builder

    • repo

      public GenericProvider.Builder repo(String repo)
      Sets the repository or project name
      Parameters:
      repo - repository name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • token

      public GenericProvider.Builder token(String token)
      Sets the personal access token or API token
      Parameters:
      token - personal access token or API token
      Returns:
      this builder

    • labelsEndpoint

      public GenericProvider.Builder labelsEndpoint(URI labelsEndpoint)
      Sets the endpoint used to retrieve repository labels.
      Parameters:
      labelsEndpoint - URI of the labels API endpoint
      Returns:
      this builder

    • issueEndpoint

      public GenericProvider.Builder issueEndpoint(URI issueEndpoint)
      Sets the endpoint used to create issues.
      Parameters:
      issueEndpoint - URI of the issue API endpoint
      Returns:
      this builder

    • labelParser

      public GenericProvider.Builder labelParser(ILabelParser parser)
      Provides a custom function for parsing label responses returned from the labels endpoint.
      Parameters:
      parser - function that converts raw API response text into a set of Label objects
      Returns:
      this builder

    • payloadBuilder

      public GenericProvider.Builder payloadBuilder(IPayloadBuilder payloadBuilder)
      Provides a custom function for generating the request payload used when creating issues.
      Parameters:
      payloadBuilder - function that converts an Issue into a JSON request payload
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public GenericProvider build()
      Builds a configured GenericProvider.
      Returns:
      a new GenericProvider
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if required configuration values are missing
